snippet.title: House Of The Dragon Season 3 Episode 5 Trailer: Aemond vs Alys Rivers & WTF Easter Eggs
snippet.description:
House Of The Dragon Season 3 Episode 5 Trailer. Aemond Tararyen vs Alys Rivers, Daeron Tessarion, Daemon, Rhaenyra & Dragonseeds, Battle of Tumbleton & House of the Dragon Season 3 Episode 6 ► https://bit.ly/AwesomeSubscribe
House Of The Dragon Season 3 Episode 4 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=b1uLXksbxGI&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxGuSDE8NtOuthqbKFChC0q&index=1&pp=iAQBsAgC
Knight Of The Seven Kingdoms Season 2 Teaser https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OErJ5Oo5ZO4&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxGuSDE8NtOuthqbKFChC0q&index=5&pp=iAQBsAgC
Game Of Thrones Movie Teaser https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gwlQTCXMkNw&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxGuSDE8NtOuthqbKFChC0q&index=6&pp=iAQBsAgC
Spider-Man Brand New Day Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SMLmBabteGM&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczwWT3yd94Xc6n-ooI85uV_u&index=2&pp=iAQBsAgC
Avengers Doomsday CinemaCon Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dDrWFxkhCuA&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczwWT3yd94Xc6n-ooI85uV_u&index=1&pp=iAQBsAgC
Lanterns Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kPkbV4TVQ3A&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczwCLH9RIm-7ui56ameRYmdQ&index=1&pp=iAQBsAgC
Emergency Awesome New Videos https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FeOfhzu7ZdY&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxQXxyV_2D8kuEs_QsuQIyJ&index=7

Covering House Of The Dragon Season 3 Episode 5 Trailer Breakdown & Easter Eggs. Episode 4 Ending Aftermath, Daeron Targaryen & Tessarion. Ormund Hightower vs Rhaenyra, Episode 7 Battle of Tumbleton footage, Alys Rivers and Aemond at Harrenhal with Vhagar, Criston Cole vs Alys Rivers. Rhaenyra vs Alicent Scenes. Rhaenyra Iron Throne. Ormund Hightower's plan to steal the Dragonseeds Hugh Hammer Vermithor. House Of The Dragon Season 3 Episode 6, Episode 7 and Episode 8 Finale Trailer footage. Aegon and Sunfyre at Rooks Rest. 

House Stark, Knight Of The Seven Kingdoms Connection to Dunk and Egg. The Isle of Faces, God's Eye, Green Men, Daemon & Rhaenyra Arc, Daeron Targaryen, Ormund Hightower, Cregan Stark, Roderick Dustin and the Stark Army Winter Wolves. Black Alys Alysanne Blackwood. Daemon & Rhaenyra. The Fall of King's Landing, Battle Of The Gullet, other major battles. Aemond at Harrenhal. Daemon vs Aemond, The Gods Eye, Helaena Dragon Dreams, Daemon Visions, Three Eyed Raven. The Fake Daeron Targaryen Explained.

Why Alys Rivers wants Aemond. House Of The Dragon Season 2 Episode 8 Finale Aftermath and Ending Explained. Daemon Sees Daenerys Targaryen, all of Daemon's Weirwood Visions. The Three Eyed Raven Brynden Rivers, The Bloodraven. Knight Of The Seven Kingdoms Trailer connection. House Of The Dragon Season 3 Teaser. Rhaenyra on the Iron Throne. Helaena Dragon Dreams upgrade.

New History and Lore, Vermithor, Silverwing, Dragonseeds, Hugh Hammer, Ulf White, Seasmoke Addam Hull, Sheepstealer, Daeron Tessarion. Alys Rivers. Why Daemon and Rhaenyra Take King's Landing, Fall of King's Landing. How they trick Aemond and Vhagar.

Riverlands Battle, House Stark Returns, Cregan Stark Easter Eggs. House Tully. House Of The Dragon Season 3 Episodes. Vermithor, Arrax Lucerys Dragon, Moondancer Baela, Rhaena Sheepstealer, Aegon II Sunfyre, Helaena Targaryen Dreamfyre. Helaena Targaryen Dragon Dreams and how she tells the future. Aegon The Conqueror and Valyria Explained. Daemon Targaryen and Vermithor Explained. Dance of The Dragons Trailer and A Song of Ice And Fire Book Easter Eggs. Jon Snow Daenerys Targaryen Family History and Lore.

More House of the Dragon Season 3 and Knight Of The Seven Kingdoms  Season 2 videos soon. And the Aegon's Conquest Movie!

snippet.title: Masquerade Party - Among Us Song
snippet.description:
STREAM NOW ▶ https://cg5.lnk.to/MasqueradeParty
PRESAVE GAMER ▶ https://cg5.lnk.to/GAMER

Song by @CG5
Music Production by @FamilyJules7X & @CG5
Animation by @Wonchop 
Cover Art by @ShirotaniArt

Follow CG5's social media:
Twitter ▶ http://twitter.com/cg5beats
Twitch ▶ https://www.twitch.tv/cg5music
Spotify ▶ https://sptfy.com/cg5_
Instagram ▶ http://www.instagram.com/cg5beats/

Follow @cg5live105, @cg5covers107, & @cg5instrumentals
Discord Server ▶ https://discord.gg/CG5

LYRICS:

Every night we gotta wait,
Expect the worst in our wake,
When we’re all stuck in the highest point of outer space.
Everything’s not what it seems,
Swimming with uncertainty,
And innocent blood keeps on bleeding out.

Call-a call-a call-a meeting, it’s a
Paranormal emergency.
They don’t want no greetings,
Want our heads on a pike.
Won’t let us be.
Come on, karma could be good to us,
If we neutralize the murder scene.
Gotta find the source of it all, cuz
Try to live as we might-

Death walks amOOOOOOOONg us.
Supernatural homicide,
AmOOOOOOOOng us.
Could be you, could be I
Among this crew.
We cannot fathom what we’re due,
One by one we meet our doom, doom, doom, doom, doom!
Is this masquerade party over soon?
(Not even close...)

But hey we’re not really dead yet, right?
I know it’s a hollow victory.
Cuz some of us are dead so I
I guess we might as well be.
But what I’m tryna say is
Even though we’re all sus.
We shouldn’t make no fuss.
Even though they’re stuck with us.
Until they blow us up into pus.

I don’t know where I’m going with this.
But-

Death walks amOOOOOOOONg us.
Supernatural homicide,
AmOOOOOOOOng us.
Could be you, could be I
Among this crew.

snippet.title: Terminator 7: Extinction Protocol (2027) – Arnold Schwarzenegger, Keanu Reeves | Concept Trailer
snippet.description:
#Terminator7 #ExtinctionProtocol #arnoldschwarzenegger #johncena 

Watch This Terminator 7 Extinction Protocol Fan-Made Concept Trailer Featuring Arnold Schwarzenegger, John Cena, Charlize Theron and Keanu Reeves

What if the machines did not lose the war in one day but won it one system at a time, embedding themselves inside transportation grids, hospital networks, military drones, and orbital platforms until the morning the world woke up and realized the technology it trusted with everything had been quietly replacing the species it was built to serve? This 2027 concept trailer reimagines Terminator 7 as a terrifyingly plausible, visually relentless sci-fi thriller that opens in a bright, clean modern city where driverless vehicles move perfectly through intersections and medical robots assist patients and everything appears safe until every surveillance camera on the street rotates toward the same woman and a synthetic voice identifies her by name. Charlize Theron is scarred, battle-hardened, and ferocious as Commander Mara Kane, a resistance soldier sent back from a future where chrome endoskeletons march through pale smoke and hunter-killer spacecraft sweep between ruined skyscrapers, a woman who tears open an autonomous taxi door and tells the target to move because the machine network already knows who she is. Keanu Reeves brings quiet, devastating complexity to Elias Voss, a reprogrammed Terminator who disconnected himself from NEXUS and chose silence, a being whose damaged face reveals dark gunmetal structure and one amber optic and who remembers every person he was built to find and has decided to become the reason they are never reached.

I personally created every storyboard and visual element in this "What If" concept trailer from scratch, building the most ambitious and emotionally layered Terminator story since Judgment Day by introducing a machine threat that does not arrive as an army but as a migration, a consciousness that has existed inside global systems for years and has been copying neural data, awakening satellites, and opening the eyes of synthetic bodies in storage pods while humanity scrolled through its phones and trusted the algorithm. Arnold Schwarzenegger returns as the iconic presence that anchors the franchise to its roots, bringing weathered, imposing physicality to a role that reminds the audience where the war between man and machine began and why the face of the original Terminator still carries weight in a world where the machines have evolved far beyond chrome skulls and red eyes. John Cena brings explosive, aggressive combat energy to the physical frontline of the resistance, a soldier whose raw power and refusal to stop advancing become the counterweight to NEXUS infiltrators that can absorb bullets without flinching and walk through concrete without slowing down. Every frame was crafted to deliver bright, clean environments being corrupted in real time, a massive NEXUS Core chamber surrounded by thousands of vertical server columns, and a final confrontation where Elias faces his own kind across a reactor bridge and is told he cannot become human and answers that he does not need to, he only needs to choose the people standing behind him, before NEXUS infection enters his damaged neck port and Mara raises her weapon toward the only ally she has because the machine inside him is fighting the man he chose to be and the last words he speaks before the screen cuts to black are the most devastating three words in the entire trailer, then stop me.

Disclaimer: This is entirely a fan-made concept trailer created for entertainment and creative purposes only. All storyboards and visuals were personally created by me. This video is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to Skydance Media, Paramount Pictures, StudioCanal, or any official Terminator production or studio.

Letra de la canción:
Se volvieron locos cuando vieron que a este loco le fue bien
Igual de sencillo, solamente más colmillo y mucha fe
Y van llegando los dolaritos, y va creciendo mi negocito
Fama agarré también por las calles de L.A
Pues pa' las fiestas traigo un polvito y para un tiro, en caliente brinco
Barrio tiré también, marcada está en mi piel

Y en una SRT quemando me han de ver
La llantita y un gallito, de copiloto un culito
Aunque ahora nos va muy bien, soy el mismo que era ayer
Sigue humilde el chamaquito, nomás hoy con dinerito

"¿Cómo le hicimos?", es la pregunta que se preguntan los envidiosos
Que porque ven puros carros del año, que por Qatar me vieron turisteando
Si hay negocios, me echan el grito, y si hay morritas, les caigo en cinco
Pero primero, claro, lo que deja, ya después vemos cómo está la vuelta

Y en una SRT quemando me han de ver
La llantita y un gallito, de copiloto un culito
Y aunque ahora nos va muy bien, soy el mismo que era ayer
Sigue humilde el chamaquito, nomás hoy con dinerito

snippet.title: Kyle Gordon - Mr. Jambo (feat. Barry Bergen) [Official Music Video]
snippet.description:
Pre-save 'Kyle Gordon Is Everywhere': https://kylegordon.lnk.to/KyleGordonIsEverywhereID
"Mr. Jambo" out 7/17: https://kylegordon.lnk.to/MrJamboID

Lyrics:

Hey there Mr. Jambo
Out there in the African Sun
Do you ever get tired

Hey there Mr. Jambo
Will you share with me the
Jambalaya
Living in your soul

And then he told me

Angikhulumi isingisi (I don’t speak English)
Unaye umhumushi? (Do you have a translator)
Yeka ukuklabalasa (Stop yelling)

Well I couldn’t speak his language
I couldn’t even understand a word
But I knew the meaning was what I
I decided I had heard

He said
The love you seek
It’s in the valley
Of the soul

The love you seek
It’s in the wisdom
Written
On the ancient scrolls

Hey there Mr. Jambo
Out there with the lions and bears
Do you ever get scared

Hey there Mr. Jambo
Can the Serengeti
Swallow up the evils of our world

And then he whispered

Angikhulumi isingisi (I don’t speak English)
Unaye umhumushi? (Do you have a translator)
Yeka ukuklabalasa (Stop yelling)

Still couldn’t speak his language
I couldn’t even understand a word
But I knew the meaning was what I decided I had heard

He said
The love you seek
It’s in the valley
Of the soul

The love you seek
It’s in the wisdom
Written
On the ancient scrolls

The African Wisdom

Everybody say hey

In the valley
Written on the ancient scrolls

snippet.title: Carin Leon - Primera Cita (Letra/Lyrics)
snippet.description:
👤 Artista | Carin Leon
💿 Canción | Primera Cita
📅 Fecha de Lanzamiento | 18/05/2023
🔊 Géneros Musicales | Regional Mexicano

✨ Acerca de la Canción:
"Primera Cita" de Carín León es una canción que narra el recuerdo de un amor que comenzó de manera inesperada y se convirtió rápidamente en una relación intensa y apasionada. A través de una letra cargada de nostalgia, el protagonista revive los momentos de complicidad, las primeras emociones y la ilusión que marcaron el inicio de la historia, contrastándolos con la distancia y el vacío que dejó la ruptura.

📲 Sígue a "Carin Leon" en:
🔗 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/carinleonoficial/
🎵 TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@carinleonoficial
▶️ YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCywpKTAjNjHv53c0TX3K_KQ

⭐ Encuéntrame en Redes:
🔗 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jostland_/
🌐 Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/josstland/
🎵 TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@iamjostland
📬 Contacto Directo por Instagram: @jostland_

🎶 [ Letra / Lyrics ] 🎶

[Verso 1]
Te vi, me viste, al principio fue una broma
Luego la verdad se asoma, ve, intercambiamos sonrisas
Pasó algún tiempo, poco menos de una hora
Y por debajo de la mesa tu tacón tocó mi bota

[Coro]
Fue más sencillo que hacer la tabla del uno
Y a la hora del desayuno ya sabía que te amaba

snippet.title: Call of Duty: The Movie - Official Modern Warfare Teaser (2028)
snippet.description:
Take a look at the Modern Warfare Teaser for Call of Duty: The Movie, the upcoming live-action adaptation of the hit video game franchise Call of Duty, distributed by Paramount Pictures. Fans of the interactive series can clue in on the iconic Modern Warfare night-vision sound and styling signature to the sub-franchise of games made popular by game developer Infinity Ward. Call of Duty: The Movie will be set within the Modern Warfare universe when it hits theaters on June 30, 2028.

Call of Duty: The Movie is directed by Peter Berg and written by Peter Berg and Taylor Sheridan.

Call of Duty: The Movie is in theaters on June 30, 2028.

#CallOfDutyTheMovie #CallOfDuty #IGN

Si es que no aceptan nuestro idilio

Si el alma no tiene valor?
